titleStmt.title: SII 29.58: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 58. (A.R. No. 63 of 1961-62.) KOLANUPĀKA, BHUVANAGIRI TALUK, NALGONDA DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the same pillar (No. 25), Museum No. 82.

It states that during the reign of Chālukya Tribhuvanamalla hērisandhivigrahi daṇḍanāyaka Chiddarasa while administering Kollipāke-7000 made a gift of a village Pākuguṇte situated in Kōḍada-12 free of all taxes to the god Svayambhu Sōmēśvara. Also it records a gift of a house for a perpetual lamp to the same god by a certain Sōmarasa.

This record engraved on the other two faces of the same pillar (No. 25) is dated in the Chālukya Vikrama year 22, Īśvara, Pushya, ba. 5 Thursday, uttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti. It corresponds to 1097 A.D., December 26, Saturday (not Thursday). There was no saṁkrānti on that day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© . svasti samasta bhuvanāśra
ya śrī pṟithvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirāja paramēśvara para
ma bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya ku
ḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ
śrī matribhuvanamalladē
vara vijeya rājyamutta
rōttarābhivriddhi pravarddhamā
namācaṁdrārkka tāraṁbaraṁ
kalyāṇada nelevīḍinoḷsu
khasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ
geyyuttamire śrīmanmahā
pracaṇḍa daṇḍanāyakaṁ vibhu
varadāyakaṁ satyarā
dhēyaṁ sacāṁjisēyaṁ sara
ṇāgata vajrapaṁjaraṁ vairidi
kkuṁjaraṁ bhāvanagandhavāra
ṇaṁ ripu madānēkavāraṇaṁ
śrīmatṛ(tri)bhuvanamalladēva
pādārādhakaṁ parabalasā
dhaka nāmādi samasta prasa
sti sahitaṁ śrī manmahāhē
ri sandhivigrahi drōhagha
raṭṭiṭṭa daṇḍanāyakaṁ cidda
rasara(re) koḷḷipāke Ercchā
siravumaṁ sukhadināḷu

ttaṁ śrīmaccāḷukya vi
krama varṣada 22 ḍa
neya Īśvara saṁva
tsarada puṣya bahu
ḷa 5 bṛhaspati vā
radaṁdu Uttarāya
ṇa saṁkrānti parvvani
mittaṁ śrī rājadhāni
koḷḷipāke śrī śvasva
yaṁbhū sōmēśvara
dēvara Aṁgabhōgakkaṁ
raṁgabhōgakkaṁ kōḍada
12 ṟa baḷiya pā
kuguṁṭeyaṁ sarvva
namasyaṁ tṛ(tri)bhō
gābhyantara śuddhiyā
gi dhārāpūrvvaka(ṁ)
māḍi koṭṭar © © .
śrī sōmēśvara dēvara naṁ
dādīvige(ge) mane
sōmarasar dēvara yiStops here.
[Note: Only the second face of this inscription has been published in the Kannada Inscription of A.P.G. Arch. series No. 3-Ng-47, p. 62-63].
Digital edition of SII 29.58 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
